task: Analyze the provided Git repository fixture and identify where a GitHub import crash starts.

issue.title: Repository import crashes before parsing starts
issue.body: Some imports fail with 'NoneType' object has no attribute 'get' before any parser symbols are produced. It happens when the upstream file-list response is missing.

comments.body: The parser loop is not reached for this failure.

tools.name: list_repo_files
tools.description: List bounded Python files in the provided repository.

tools.name: search_repo_symbols
tools.description: Search Python functions/classes in the repository and rank them against issue evidence.

tools.name: search_repo_text
tools.description: Search code text for symptoms and output strings.

tools.name: read_repo_file
tools.description: Read bounded Python file contents from the repository.
